name: Layout

values.name: alignAtBaseline
values.comment:
alignAtBaseline =
        Html.Attributes.style "align-items" "baseline"

values.name: alignAtCenter
values.comment:
alignAtCenter =
        Html.Attributes.style "align-items" "center"

values.name: alignAtEnd
values.comment:
alignAtEnd =
        Html.Attributes.style "align-items" "flex-end"

values.name: alignAtStart
values.comment:
alignAtStart =
        Html.Attributes.style "align-items" "flex-start"

values.name: alignStretched
values.comment:
alignStretched =
        Html.Attributes.style "align-items" "stretch"

values.name: asButton
values.comment:
Turns anything into a button

    asButton args =
        [ Html.Attributes.style "cursor" "pointer"
        , Html.Attributes.attribute "aria-label" args.label
        , Html.Attributes.attribute "role" "button"
        ]
            ++ (args.onPress
                    |> Maybe.map (\msg -> [ Html.Events.onClick msg ])
                    |> Maybe.withDefault []
               )
values.type: { onPress : Maybe.Maybe msg, label : String.String } -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg)

values.name: asEl
values.comment:
asEl =
        Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex"

values.name: button
values.comment:
button args attrs content =
        Html.button (asEl :: asButton args ++ attrs)
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> { onPress : Maybe.Maybe msg, label : String.String } -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: centered
values.comment:
centered =
        [ contentCentered, alignAtCenter ]

values.name: column
values.comment:
column attrs =
        Html.div
            ([ Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex"
             , Html.Attributes.style "flex-direction" "column"
             ]
                ++ attrs
            )
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: container
values.comment:
Fills the entire screen. Should be the outer most element.

    container attrs =
        el
            ([ Html.Attributes.style "width" "100%"
             , Html.Attributes.style "height" "100%"
             , Html.Attributes.style "position" "absolute"
             , Html.Attributes.style "left" "0px"
             , Html.Attributes.style "top" "0px"
             ]
                ++ attrs
            )
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: contentAtEnd
values.comment:
contentAtEnd =
        Html.Attributes.style "justify-content" "flex-end"

values.name: contentAtStart
values.comment:
contentAtStart =
        Html.Attributes.style "justify-content" "flex-start"

values.name: contentCentered
values.comment:
contentCentered =
        Html.Attributes.style "justify-content" "center"

values.name: contentWithSpaceBetween
values.comment:
contentWithSpaceBetween =
        Html.Attributes.style "justify-content" "space-between"

values.name: descriptionList
values.comment:
descriptionList attrs content =
        Html.dl
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            (content
                |> List.concatMap
                    (\{ description, item } ->
                        [ description |> (\( a, h ) -> Html.dt a [ h ])
                        , item |> (\( a, h ) -> Html.dd a [ h ])
                        ]
                    )
            )
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List { description : ( List.List (Html.Attribute msg), Html.Html msg ), item : ( List.List (Html.Attribute msg), Html.Html msg ) } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: el
values.comment:
el attrs content =
        Html.div
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex"
                :: attrs
            )
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: fill
values.comment:
fill =
        fillPortion 1

values.name: fillPortion
values.comment:
fillPortion n =
        Html.Attributes.style "flex" (String.fromInt n)

values.name: gap
values.comment:
gap n =
        Html.Attributes.style "gap" (String.fromFloat n ++ "px")

values.name: heading1
values.comment:
heading1 attrs content =
        Html.h1
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: heading2
values.comment:
heading2 attrs content =
        Html.h2
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: heading3
values.comment:
heading3 attrs content =
        Html.h3
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: heading4
values.comment:
heading4 attrs content =
        Html.h4
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: heading5
values.comment:
heading5 attrs content =
        Html.h5
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: heading6
values.comment:
heading6 attrs content =
        Html.h6
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: horizontalRuler
values.comment:
horizontalRuler attrs =
        Html.hr attrs []

values.name: image
values.comment:
image attrs args =
        Html.img
            ([ Html.Attributes.src args.src
             , Html.Attributes.alt args.description
             ]
                ++ attrs
            )
            []
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> { src : String.String, description : String.String } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: lineBreak
values.comment:
lineBreak =
        Html.br [] []

values.name: linkTo
values.comment:
linkTo attrs link content =
        Html.a
            (Html.Attributes.href link
                :: attrs
            )
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> String.String -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: linkToNewTab
values.comment:
linkToNewTab attrs link content =
        Html.a
            ([ Html.Attributes.href link
             , Html.Attributes.target "_blank"
             ]
                ++ attrs
            )
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> String.String -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: noWrap
values.comment:
noWrap =
        Html.Attributes.style "flex-wrap" "nowrap"

values.name: none
values.comment:
none =
        Html.text ""

values.name: orderedList
values.comment:
orderedList attrs content =
        Html.ol
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            (content
                |> List.map (\( a, h ) -> Html.li a [ h ])
            )
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List ( List.List (Html.Attribute msg), Html.Html msg ) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: paragraph
values.comment:
paragraph attrs content =
        Html.p
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            [ content ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: radio
values.comment:
radio attrs args =
        Html.input
            ([ Html.Attributes.type_ "radio"
             , Html.Attributes.checked args.checked
             , Html.Attributes.attribute "aria-label" args.label
             ]
                ++ attrs
            )
            []
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> { onChange : Basics.Bool -> msg, checked : Basics.Bool, label : String.String } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: row
values.comment:
row attrs =
        Html.div
            ([ Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex"
             , Html.Attributes.style "flex-direction" "row"
             , Html.Attributes.style "flex-wrap" "wrap"
             ]
                ++ attrs
            )

Will wrap into the next line if there is not enough space.

If you don't want this behavior, you can just add `noWrap`:

    unwrappedRow attrs =
        Layout.row (Layout.noWrap ++ attrs)
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: sticky
values.comment:
sticky =
        [ Html.Attributes.style "position" "sticky"
        , Html.Attributes.style "z-index" "99999"
        ]

values.name: stickyOnBottom
values.comment:
stickyOnBottom =
        [ Html.Attributes.style "position" "sticky"
        , Html.Attributes.style "bottom" "0"
        , Html.Attributes.style "z-index" "99999"
        ]

values.name: stickyOnTop
values.comment:
stickyOnTop =
        [ Html.Attributes.style "position" "sticky"
        , Html.Attributes.style "top" "0"
        , Html.Attributes.style "z-index" "99999"
        ]

values.name: text
values.comment:
text : List (Attribute msg) -> String -> Html msg
    text attrs content =
        el attrs (Html.text content)

values.name: textButton
values.comment:
textButton attrs args =
        Html.button (asButton args ++ attrs)
            [ Html.text args.label ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> { onPress : Maybe.Maybe msg, label : String.String } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: unorderedList
values.comment:
unorderedList attrs content =
        Html.ul
            (Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex" :: attrs)
            (content
                |> List.map (\( a, h ) -> Html.li a [ h ])
            )
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List ( List.List (Html.Attribute msg), Html.Html msg ) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: withStack
values.comment:
A stack places the content on top of each other. The first element is the lowest.

    withStack : List (Attribute msg) -> List (List (Attribute msg) -> Html msg) -> Html msg -> Html msg
    withStack attrs list base =
        list
            |> List.map
                (\fun ->
                    fun [ Html.Attributes.style "position" "absolute" ]
                )
            |> (::) base
            |> Html.div
                ([ Html.Attributes.style "display" "flex"
                 , Html.Attributes.style "position" "relative"
                 ]
                    ++ attrs
                )
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: wrap
values.comment:
wrap =
        Html.Attributes.style "flex-wrap" "wrap"
